Remarks

Parkside Flats 2, a 64-unit multifamily property located at 1030 Parr Hill Drive in Martinsville, SK sold on May 19, 2023 for $13.72 million. The property is comprised of 1 building with 52,708 SF of space accommodating 1-bed (20), 2-bed (29), and 3-bed (15) units. The transaction occurred in 2023. The wood frame apartment building features a unit mix of various bedroom counts. Parkside Flats generated an estimated net operating income of $811,585, requiring a capitalization rate of 5.92%. This comparable property was included for its relevance as an additional multifamily properties.

Analysis of Comparable Sales

The comparable sales indicate an overall unadjusted unit value range from $85,627/Unit to $214,375/Unit, and an average of $145,999/Unit. After adjustments, the comparables indicate a narrower range for the subject property from $111,914/Unit to $118,100/Unit, and $115,981/Unit on average. The adjustment process is summarized below.

58 1101, 1121 109 St, North Battleford, Saskatchewan | File VAL251012-1
